Available Offers
No extra cost EMI available on select cards for orders above ₹ 2,000
Free kraft-box packaging with every order — gift-ready out of the box
Handwritten care card included with every piece — no extra charge

Meet our most-loved piece — a warm, round sun with a gentle face and golden rays. Crocheted over 10+ hours using premium anti-pill yarn, she sits comfortably on shelves, desks, and windowsills. Each one is slightly different. Each one is made for you.

Material Anti-pill acrylic yarn (Scheepjes Stonewashed or similar)
Filling Premium polyester fibrefill
Eyes Safety eyes — 6 mm Mini · 9 mm Medium · 12 mm Large
Weight 40–120 g depending on size
Care Spot clean only with damp cloth and mild soap
Origin Handmade in India
Handcrocheted by a single pair of hands
Named & numbered — never duplicated
Wrapped in kraft paper with a sun stamp
Handwritten care card enclosed
Ships in 7–10 working days

Spot clean only with a damp cloth and mild soap

Do not machine wash or submerge in water

Keep away from direct sunlight for prolonged periods to preserve colour

A light shake fluffs her right back up after travel or storage

Made to order — crafted in 7–10 working days after confirmation

Shipped via India Post or Delhivery within India; Speed Post for international

As each piece is custom-made, we do not accept returns

If your piece arrives damaged, WhatsApp us a photo within 48 hours and we'll make it right
